insights: The market shows a strong upward trend, with the current 7-day average (1442) significantly outperforming the 30-day average (1396), indicating accelerating hiring momentum.
FAANG+ companies are aggressively expanding their new graduate headcount, offsetting the stagnation in infrastructure and SRE roles.

While niche technical roles like infrastructure are seeing a contraction, the core software engineering category remains resilient, suggesting a focus on product-centric hiring for the upcoming cycle.
